text:
READ-ONLY review of the new source-aware Quickshell content transition. Inspect current StatusData.qml transaction metadata and Bar.qml content motion, plus AppLauncher/UpdateSelector removal of local presented animations. Requirement: internal elements should move based on actual source widget and destination widget, including direct launcher↔updates, open/close to workspaces, cross-monitor moves, same-height transitions, timers, and rapid/interrupted transitions. Check for stuck centerTransitionPending, incorrect intermediate source modes, wrong per-monitor mapping/direction, binding/runtime issues, or regressions in cleanup/exclusivity. Do not edit. Report blockers/medium findings with exact lines, or CLEAN.

## Acceptance Contract
Acceptance level: attested
Completion is not accepted from prose alone. End with a structured acceptance report.

Criteria:
- criterion-1: Return concrete findings with file paths and severity when applicable

Required evidence: review-findings, residual-risks

Finish with a fenced JSON block tagged `acceptance-report` in this shape:
Use empty arrays when no items apply; array fields contain strings unless object entries are shown.
`criteriaSatisfied[].status` must be exactly one of: satisfied, not-satisfied, not-applicable.
`commandsRun[].result` must be exactly one of: passed, failed, not-run.
`manualNotes` and `notes` are optional strings; an empty string means no note and does not satisfy `manual-notes` evidence.
```acceptance-report
{
  "criteriaSatisfied": [
    {
      "id": "criterion-1",
      "status": "satisfied",
      "evidence": "specific proof"
    }
  ],
  "changedFiles": [
    "src/file.ts"
  ],
  "testsAddedOrUpdated": [
    "test/file.test.ts"
  ],
  "commandsRun": [
    {
      "command": "command",
      "result": "passed",
      "summary": "short result"
    }
  ],
  "validationOutput": [
    "validation output or concise summary"
  ],
  "residualRisks": [
    "none"
  ],
  "noStagedFiles": true,
  "diffSummary": "short description of the diff",
  "reviewFindings": [
    "blocker: file.ts:12 - issue found, or no blockers"
  ],
  "manualNotes": "anything else the parent should know"
}
```

--- AppLauncher ---
     1	import Quickshell
     2	import QtQuick
     3	
     4	FocusScope {
     5	  id: root
     6	
     7	  required property var statusData
     8	  readonly property var results: statusData.appLauncherResults
     9	  implicitWidth: 480
    10	  implicitHeight: 398
    11	
    12	  function syncSearchText() {
    13	    if (searchInput.text !== statusData.appLauncherQuery) {
    14	      searchInput.text = statusData.appLauncherQuery;
    15	      searchInput.cursorPosition = searchInput.text.length;
    16	    }
    17	  }
    18	
    19	  function revealSelection() {
    20	    if (statusData.appLauncherSelectedIndex >= 0 && results.length > 0)
    21	      appList.positionViewAtIndex(statusData.appLauncherSelectedIndex,
    22	        ListView.Contain);
    23	  }
    24	
    25	  onEnabledChanged: {
    26	    if (enabled) {
    27	      syncSearchText();
    28	      Qt.callLater(() => {
    29	        searchInput.forceActiveFocus();
    30	        revealSelection();
    31	      });
    32	    }
    33	  }
    34	
    35	  Connections {
    36	    target: statusData
    37	
    38	    function onAppLauncherQueryChanged() {
    39	      root.syncSearchText();
    40	    }
    41	
    42	    function onAppLauncherResultsChanged() {
    43	      Qt.callLater(() => root.revealSelection());
    44	    }
    45	
    46	    function onAppLauncherSelectedIndexChanged() {
    47	      root.revealSelection();
    48	    }
    49	  }
    50	
    51	  Item {
    52	    anchors.fill: parent
    53	
    54	    Text {
    55	      id: searchIcon
    56	      anchors.left: parent.left
    57	      anchors.leftMargin: 16
    58	      y: 9
    59	      width: 22
    60	      height: 24
    61	      horizontalAlignment: Text.AlignHCenter
    62	      verticalAlignment: Text.AlignVCenter
    63	      text: "󰍉"
    64	      color: "#ff33cc"
    65	      font.family: "Ubuntu Nerd Font"
    66	      font.pixelSize: 17
    67	      font.bold: true
    68	    }
    69	
    70	    TextInput {
    71	      id: searchInput
    72	      anchors.left: searchIcon.right
    73	      anchors.leftMargin: 10
    74	      anchors.right: resultCount.left
    75	      anchors.rightMargin: 12
    76	      y: 7
    77	      height: 28
    78	      verticalAlignment: TextInput.AlignVCenter
    79	      color: "#cad3f5"
    80	      selectionColor: "#ff33cc"
    81	      selectedTextColor: "#181926"
    82	      clip: true
    83	      font.family: "Ubuntu Nerd Font"
    84	      font.pixelSize: 14
    85	      font.bold: true
    86	      cursorVisible: activeFocus
    87	
    88	      onTextEdited: statusData.setAppLauncherQuery(text)
    89	
    90	      Keys.onPressed: event => {
    91	        const control = event.modifiers & Qt.ControlModifier;
    92	        if (event.key === Qt.Key_Down || (control && event.key === Qt.Key_N)
    93	            || event.key === Qt.Key_Tab) {
    94	          statusData.moveAppLauncherSelection(1);
    95	          event.accepted = true;
    96	        } else if (event.key === Qt.Key_Up || (control && event.key === Qt.Key_P)
    97	            || (event.key === Qt.Key_Backtab)) {
    98	          statusData.moveAppLauncherSelection(-1);
    99	          event.accepted = true;
   100	        } else if (event.key === Qt.Key_PageDown) {
   101	          statusData.moveAppLauncherSelection(8);
   102	          event.accepted = true;
   103	        } else if (event.key === Qt.Key_PageUp) {
   104	          statusData.moveAppLauncherSelection(-8);
   105	          event.accepted = true;
   106	        } else if (event.key === Qt.Key_Home && control) {
   107	          statusData.appLauncherSelectedIndex = 0;
   108	          event.accepted = true;
   109	        } else if (event.key === Qt.Key_End && control
   110	            && statusData.appLauncherResults.length > 0) {
   111	          statusData.appLauncherSelectedIndex
   112	            = statusData.appLauncherResults.length - 1;
   113	          event.accepted = true;
   114	        } else if (event.key === Qt.Key_Return || event.key === Qt.Key_Enter) {
   115	          statusData.launchSelectedApp(statusData.appLauncherSelectedIndex,
   116	            (event.modifiers & Qt.ShiftModifier) !== 0);
   117	          event.accepted = true;
   118	        } else if (event.key === Qt.Key_Escape) {
   119	          statusData.hideAppLauncher();
   120	          event.accepted = true;
   121	        }
   122	      }
   123	    }
   124	
   125	    Text {
   126	      anchors.left: searchInput.left
   127	      anchors.right: searchInput.right
   128	      y: searchInput.y
   129	      height: searchInput.height
   130	      visible: searchInput.text === ""
   131	      verticalAlignment: Text.AlignVCenter
   132	      text: "Search applications…"
   133	      color: "#6e738d"
   134	      font.family: "Ubuntu Nerd Font"
   135	      font.pixelSize: 14
   136	      font.bold: true
   137	    }
   138	
   139	    Text {
   140	      id: resultCount
   141	      anchors.right: parent.right
   142	      anchors.rightMargin: 16
   143	      y: 9
   144	      width: 88
   145	      height: 24
   146	      horizontalAlignment: Text.AlignRight
   147	      verticalAlignment: Text.AlignVCenter

text:
quickshell [OPTIONS] [SUBCOMMAND]


OPTIONS:
  -h,     --help              Print this help message and exit
  -V,     --version           Print quickshell's version and exit.
  -n,     --no-duplicate      Exit immediately if another instance of the given config is
                              running.
  -d,     --daemonize         Detach from the controlling terminal.
[Option Group: Config Selection]
  Quickshell detects configurations as named directories under each XDG config
  directory as `<xdg dir>/quickshell/<config name>/shell.qml`.
  
  If `<xdg dir>/quickshell/shell.qml` exists, it will be registered as the
  'default' configuration, and no subdirectories will be considered. If --config
  is not passed, 'default' will be assumed.
  
  Alternatively, a config can be selected by path with --path.
  
  Examples:
  - `~/.config/quickshell/shell.qml` can be run with `qs`
  - `/etc/xdg/quickshell/myconfig/shell.qml` can be run with `qs -c myconfig`
  - `~/myshell/shell.qml` can be run with `qs -p ~/myshell`
  - `~/myshell/randomfile.qml` can be run with `qs -p ~/myshell/randomfile.qml`
  
  
OPTIONS:
  -p,     --path TEXT (Env:QS_CONFIG_PATH) Excludes: --config --manifest 
                              Path to a QML file or config folder.
  -c,     --config TEXT (Env:QS_CONFIG_NAME) Excludes: --path 
                              Name of a quickshell configuration to run.
  -m,     --manifest TEXT (Env:QS_MANIFEST) Excludes: --path 
                              [DEPRECATED] Path to a quickshell manifest.
                              If a manifest is specified, configs named by -c will point to its
                              entries.
                              Defaults to $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/quickshell/manifest.conf
[Option Group: Logging]
  
OPTIONS:
          --no-color          Disables colored logging.
                              Colored logging can also be disabled by specifying a non empty
                              value for the NO_COLOR environment variable.
          --log-times         Log timestamps with each message.
          --log-rules TEXT    Log rules to apply, in the format of QT_LOGGING_RULES.
  -v,     --verbose           Increases log verbosity.
                              -v will show INFO level internal logs.
                              -vv will show DEBUG level internal logs.
[Option Group: Debugging]
  Options for QML debugging.
  
  
OPTIONS:

## Review
- **CLEAN:** No blocker or medium findings.
- **Correct:** Transaction ownership prevents nested cleanup calls from overwriting the logical source; pending is synchronously cleared before serial publication (`StatusData.qml:497-515`).
- **Correct:** Direct launcher↔updates and cross-monitor transitions retain source/target mode and monitor metadata (`StatusData.qml:525-538`, `StatusData.qml:993-1004`).
- **Correct:** Each bar maps remote modes to local workspaces, producing appropriate per-monitor direction (`Bar.qml:210-235`, `Bar.qml:270-281`).
- **Correct:** Equal-height transitions intentionally reset to zero motion, while interrupted animations are stopped and restarted cleanly (`Bar.qml:226-235`).
- **Correct:** Timer closures use the same transaction-aware hide paths (`StatusData.qml:1265-1281`).
- **Correct:** AppLauncher and UpdateSelector contain no local `presented`/content-bounce animation; motion is centralized in `Bar.qml:261-268`.
- **Note:** Runtime visual behavior was not exercised because that requires launching the live compositor shell. Static inspection found no QML binding or ownership issue in the reviewed path.
